heading: Architecting Scalable Systems with a Product Mindset
subheading: Based in Pakistan, Making Impact Globally.
bio: With over 7 years of professional experience, I have evolved into a Senior Frontend Engineer specialized in architecting extensible, low-debt systems for international clients.

My approach centers on technical leadership and architectural integrity. I don't just build interfaces; I engineer feature-based architectures that balance high customizability with long-term production stability.
Today, I bridge the gap between complex business logic and high-performance UI using React and Next.js, leveraging modern AI workflows to accelerate delivery without compromising quality.

highlights.title: Architectural Excellence
highlights.description: Expertise in building feature-based architectures and modular component libraries that minimize technical debt and improve maintainability by up to 40%.

highlights.title: AI-Powered Velocity
highlights.description: Mastery of Prompt Engineering and AI tools like Claude, Gemini, and Lovable to accelerate prototyping and optimize development cycles.

highlights.title: Technical Leadership
highlights.description: Proven track record of leading distributed teams and managing technical roadmaps for high-scale ERP and Shopify ecosystems.
